keyMatches.headline: High leverage match for the qualification race
High leverage match for the qualification race
High leverage match for the qualification race
High leverage match for the qualification race
High leverage match for the qualification race

insights: VIT vs PCF is currently the highest-leverage match on the board.
Omega is contested because VIT all remain exposed to the cutoff.
FUT is the strongest lock in the current simulation snapshot.
The current simulation model is 'elo', and tie-breaks follow VCT EMEA head-to-head criteria before falling back to stage map and round differential.

notes.scenarioExtremes: Best / worst scenarios are observed within the simulation sample, not exact exhaustive optima.
notes.exactWinnerOnlyBounds: Exact over match-winner combinations only, using a deterministic 2-0 proxy scoreline for tie-break-sensitive metrics.
notes.whatIfMode: The what-if CLI generates a deterministic snapshot. Unforced matches default to the listed teamA winner so the output stays transparent and reproducible.
notes.playedMatchesPersistence: Console match updates persist to config.played_matches, update standings totals, remove the fixture from remaining_matches, and then regenerate the frontend dataset.
